input.question: Show classrooms grouped by equipment type: projector only, computers only, both, or neither

payload.question: Show classrooms grouped by equipment type: projector only, computers only, both, or neither

output.sql:
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN has_projector AND has_computers THEN 'both'
    WHEN has_projector AND NOT has_computers THEN 'projector only'
    WHEN has_computers AND NOT has_projector THEN 'computers only'
    ELSE 'neither'
  END AS equipment_type,
  COUNT(*) AS classroom_count,
  STRING_AGG(name, ', ' ORDER BY name) AS classroom_names
FROM classrooms
GROUP BY equipment_type
ORDER BY classroom_count DESC;

visualization.description: Count of classrooms by equipment type and list of classroom names in each group
visualization.title: Classrooms by Equipment Type

payload.sql:
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN has_projector AND has_computers THEN 'both'
    WHEN has_projector AND NOT has_computers THEN 'projector only'
    WHEN has_computers AND NOT has_projector THEN 'computers only'
    ELSE 'neither'
  END AS equipment_type,
  COUNT(*) AS classroom_count,
  STRING_AGG(name, ', ' ORDER BY name) AS classroom_names
FROM classrooms
GROUP BY equipment_type
ORDER BY classroom_count DESC;
